style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration of a single application or building at the centre, surrounded by four distinct review agents arranged in balance around it, one tinted green, one yellow, one red, one blue, together forming a protective seal or set of checks and balances. A sense of four disciplines guarding one piece of work in concert. Muted Alberta cream base with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, archival print quality, no text, no logos.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial cover illustration of a single application or building at the centre, surrounded by four distinct review agents arranged in balance around it, one tinted green, one yellow, one red, one blue, together forming a protective seal or set of checks and balances. A sense of four disciplines guarding one piece of work in concert. Muted Alberta cream base with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, archival print quality, no text, no logos.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
